message:
fix: prevent silent length truncation in trace writer and H2 frame encoding

trace/file.rs (3 bugs):
- meta_len, event_len, chunk_len used `len() as u32` which silently
  truncates payloads >4GB. Changed to u32::try_from with explicit error.

http/h2/frame.rs (7 bugs):
- All frame encode methods cast payload length via `as u32` without
  validating the 24-bit wire limit (MAX_FRAME_SIZE = 16,777,215).
  Added frame_length() helper that clamps to MAX_FRAME_SIZE, plus
  debug_assert in FrameHeader::write(). Also fixed settings encode
  to use saturating_mul for the `len * 6` computation.

http/h2/hpack.rs (2 bugs):
- size -= evicted.size() could underflow if size tracking invariant
  is broken. Changed to saturating_sub for defense-in-depth.

combinator/circuit_breaker.rs (2 bugs):
- success_count + failure_count u32 sum in failure_rate/should_open
  could overflow. Changed to saturating_add.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
